task: Phase 12 — exhaustive live bug hunt by spawning claude as subprocess and exercising every axhub slash command + skill workflow. Capture failures, classify as bugs, fix + ship hotfixes.

stories.title: Subprocess claude harness — verify claude -p works with plugin loaded + capture output
acceptanceCriteria: tests/live-plugin-smoke.sh (NEW) — bash harness that spawns `claude -p '<prompt>'` for each slash command with timeout + captures stdout/stderr/exit to .omc/evidence/live-plugin-smoke-<command>.txt.
Verify subprocess inherits axhub plugin (cached at ~/.claude/plugins/cache/axhub or directory mode from settings).
First test: `claude -p '/axhub:help'` → output contains help text (or hookSpecificOutput from session-start).

stories.title: Live test all 9 axhub slash commands — capture + classify each result
acceptanceCriteria: Run subprocess claude with each slash command: /axhub:status, /axhub:doctor, /axhub:apps, /axhub:apis, /axhub:deploy, /axhub:logs, /axhub:login, /axhub:update, /axhub:help.
For each: capture exit code + stdout + stderr + any rendered error templates.
Evidence file .omc/evidence/live-plugin-smoke-summary.txt — table per command: pass/fail/error class.
Document each failure as concrete bug (unexpected error, missing functionality, broken UX).

stories.title: Fix all bugs found in US-1202 — ship as v0.1.X hotfix(es)
acceptanceCriteria: For each bug: minimal fix + regression test that locks the contract.
All hotfix versions tagged + pushed (v0.1.X for each fix or one combined release).
Re-run US-1201 harness post-fix → all commands now pass or have honest 4-part Korean error path.

metadata.task_origin: /ralph 다시 한번 더 플러그인을 claude code 안에서 실행해서 버그 찾아줘봐. 서브 프로세스로 띄어서 해봐
metadata.predecessor: Phase 11 v0.1.11 — 3 bugs already found via direct binary smoke (BOM, list-deployments shape, redact pattern)
metadata.scope_note: Subprocess-driven live test — exercises full Claude Code → hook → skill → helper → API loop. Most realistic vibe coder simulation possible from dev env.
